extraction_note: Insufficient source material provided. The TCRF source contains only navigation metadata and a content policy redirect (not actual game documentation). The Wikipedia source is a disambiguation page listing the Syndicate series but contains no specific design documentation for the 1995 SNES adaptation. No design philosophy, difficulty mechanics, progression systems, or boss design data could be extracted from these sources. To complete this extraction, original sources such as: game manuals, developer interviews, contemporary game reviews, in-game documentation, or design postmortems would be required.
